name: log_decision
description: Log, list, and supersede BA project decisions with rationale and BABOK context. Use this to build a traceable decision log for a project. Before calling 'add', optionally call knowledge_base_search with source='babok' and pass relevant results as babok_context. Actions: 'add' records a new decision, 'list' retrieves decisions (filterable by project and status), 'supersede' marks an old decision as replaced by a newer one, 'get' retrieves a single decision by id.

user_id.description: User ID from session context. Always required.

project.description: Project name this decision belongs to. Optional but strongly recommended.

rationale.description: Why this decision was made. Required for 'add'.

alternatives.description: List of alternative options that were considered and rejected.

owner.description: Person or role accountable for this decision.

babok_context.description: Relevant BABOK excerpts from knowledge_base_search to ground the decision in best practices.

decision_id.description: UUID of the decision. Required for 'supersede' and 'get'.

new_decision_id.description: UUID of the decision that supersedes the current one. Required for 'supersede'.
